description: Fix a misleading success message in config rotate-secret when the auth file write fails, discovered during a comprehensive backend code audit.

userStories.title: Fix handleRotateSecret continuing after auth file write failure
userStories.description: As a user, I want rotate-secret to exit with an error if the auth file cannot be written so that I am not misled into thinking the rotation succeeded.
acceptanceCriteria: If writeAuthFile throws, handleRotateSecret prints an error message and exits with process.exit(1) instead of continuing to notify the server
The error message tells the user the secret was NOT rotated
